steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says scholars maintain a rigid distinction between actor and character while avoiding ______ them. The blank must mean merging or blurring the two distinct things into one.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "conflate": To treat two separate things as if they are the same. 'Never to conflate them' = never treating actor and character as one entity. ✓
  • "epitomize": To be the perfect example of something. 'Never to epitomize them' makes no sense in context. ✗
  • "lambaste": To criticize harshly. Unrelated to merging distinct entities. ✗
  • "overshadow": To be more prominent than something else. Describes dominance, not merging. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
